narrative: US-Iran memorandum of understanding drives broad risk-on sentiment as crude retreats toward $80 — gold higher +2.97% near $4,365; equities +0.50%; DXY -0.23%; VIX 16.6. USD/JPY holds at 160.13 despite de-escalation as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid; options market shows moderate put skew with -1.10 25d RR. EUR/USD firms to 1.1617 on USD weakness, though 150bp Fed-ECB carry advantage remains the structural anchor. Watch BoJ and RBA rate decisions tomorrow for the next G10 policy catalysts.
